# Custom Backpack Factory

> Custom backpack manufacturer based in Baigou, Hebei, China. We produce custom backpacks for schools, travel, business, and outdoor brands with MOQs from 50-500 units and sample development in 7-15 days. Serving clients across North America, Europe, and Russia.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.custombackpackfactory.com/): Factory overview and capabilities
- [Products](https://www.custombackpackfactory.com/products): Custom backpack catalog
- [Custom Service](https://www.custombackpackfactory.com/custom-service): Backpack OEM/ODM customization workflow
- [Factory](https://www.custombackpackfactory.com/factory): Backpack production process and capability
- [About](https://www.custombackpackfactory.com/about): Factory background and manufacturing capabilities
- [Contact](https://www.custombackpackfactory.com/contact): Inquiry and quote requests

## Blog

- [How Custom Backpacks Are Made](https://www.custombackpackfactory.com/blog/how-custom-backpacks-are-made): Step-by-step factory production guide

## Company Facts

- Location: Baigou, Hebei Province, China
- Specialty: Custom backpack manufacturing (school, travel, business, outdoor)
- MOQ: 50-500 units
- Sample lead time: 7-15 days
- Markets: North America, Europe, Russia
